layout_and_spacing.widget_classes: col-span-1 md:col-span-2 row-span-2 h-full flex flex-col

cards.classes: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#10B981]/20 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#10B981]/10 border border-[#10B981] text-[#10B981] hover:bg-[#10B981] hover:text-black rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-sm font-mono transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-[#EF4444]/10 border border-[#EF4444] text-[#EF4444] hover:bg-[#EF4444] hover:text-black rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-sm font-mono transition-all

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#10B981]/30 focus:border-[#10B981] text-[#F9FAFB] focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-2 font-mono text-sm transition-colors placeholder:text-[#4B5563]

dialogs.style: bg-[#0A0A0A]/95 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#10B981]/30 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(16,185,129,0.15)] rounded-sm

effects: Scanlines: CSS repeating-linear-gradient overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 1px, transparent 2px) across main background
Blinking Cursor: Animated rect element for active terminal inputs
Glow: drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)] on critical security status icons
Tracing Beam: Use a glowing moving border around the main login card or threat logs

animations.hover: Subtle border glow increase and color inversion on buttons
animations.data_entry: Typewriter effect for logs, threat feeds, and encryption status terminal output
animations.entrance: Staggered fade in with slight y-axis transform (-translate-y-2 to 0)

image_urls.description: Abstract dark mode cybersecurity background, glowing green binary data streams
Modern hacker terminal aesthetic texture, dark gray and black grid with glowing neon green nodes
Fingerprint biometric scan abstract visualization, dark mode, glowing emerald green lines
Intricate black geometric pattern featuring diamond shapes

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure green text meets 4.5:1 ratio against pure black backgrounds
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, buttons, form inputs, threat log items, and security toggles MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override them: remove soft rounded corners (`rounded-md`, `rounded-lg`) and replace with `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none`.
Remove default Shadcn subtle gray borders and replace with stark `border-[#10B981]/20` for a terminal grid feel.
Data components (tables, charts, logs) should be dense, maximizing the 'Control Room' screen space. Remove unnecessary whitespace.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numbers, metrics, data points, inputs, and headings. Use IBM Plex Sans for long-form reading and body copy only.
The UI should feel like a high-end secure terminal: dark, precise, with no unnecessary soft gradients.
Ensure all major interactions (login, verify, lock config) have clearly visible `data-testid` attributes.
Charts must be monochromatic green with red/amber accents for anomalies or threats. Avoid playful or multi-colored chart palettes.
